name: vendor.myndhyve.app-builder
description: MyndHyve App Builder typeIds — app-builder.per-screen (single-task screen generation: chat-send → typed-envelope-await with bounded retry) + app-builder.iterate-tasks (multi-task serial loop over feature tasks with task-level failure isolation). Both consume host.chat + host.aiEnvelope.await. Host concerns (progress cards, telemetry, pilot materializer) intentionally NOT in pack — pack returns categorized task results that host MAY render however it wishes.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Generate Screen for Task
nodes.description: Single-task screen generation. Sends a per-screen prompt via ctx.chat.sendMessage and awaits the typed envelope (default 'screen.emit') via ctx.aiEnvelope.await with bounded retry (config.taskRetryCount). Returns screenId from envelope payload + categorized failure reason on timeout/error.

nodes.label: Iterate Feature Tasks
nodes.description: Multi-task serial loop. Extracts feature tasks from a plan artifact (robust to 4 observed AI plan shapes — canonical PlanModel, AI default, AI-confused envelope, AI-nested phase wrapper) and runs per-screen sequentially. Task-level failure isolation by default; config.failOnAnyTaskError aborts on first failure. Returns taskResults[] with per-task success + screenId + categorized failure reason + failuresByReason histogram.
